3281250.name: Öga
3281250.description:
Try to get as high up as you can in this arcade 2D platformer! As Öga, an eye with boots, you have the ability to shoot enemies to freeze and climb them. Try to get as high as you can and get a high score!

Level up

As you get further and further, you will unlock new levels and encounter new enemies, more challenging than the last!

Set the daily high score

Get the high score of the day to have your name displayed on the top right for the whole world to see!

A pair of eyes is better than one eye

Invite or join a friends online game to try and set the highest score together!
